transit.title: Bus Rapid Transit Expansion
transit.description: Create dedicated lanes and modern bus terminals to move more people faster across the city.
transit.tradeOff: Fast mobility gains, but eats a large slice of capital budget.

housing.title: Mixed-Income Housing Program
housing.description: Unlock land, support densification, and co-fund affordable housing near job clusters.
housing.tradeOff: Improves inclusion and housing pressure, but can trigger land and infrastructure stress.

drainage.title: Drainage and Flood Defense
drainage.description: Upgrade drainage channels, desilt waterways, and expand flood defense in vulnerable districts.
drainage.tradeOff: Protects long-term growth, but the wins are less visible than shiny new projects.

waste.title: Waste Collection Overhaul
waste.description: Improve collection routes, sorting hubs, and enforcement against illegal dumping.
waste.tradeOff: Low glamour, high impact. Keeps the city healthier but rarely excites investors.

tech-hubs.title: Startup and Innovation District
tech-hubs.description: Create serviced workspaces, small grants, and talent pipelines for high-growth firms.
tech-hubs.tradeOff: Strong growth story, but can deepen inequality if basics are ignored.

markets.title: Market Modernisation
markets.description: Upgrade stalls, storage, sanitation, and access roads for informal and formal trade hubs.
markets.tradeOff: Boosts everyday commerce quickly, but can stall if traffic and utilities stay weak.

industrial-power.title: Power Reliability for Industry
industrial-power.description: Support captive power, mini-grids, and substation upgrades for factories and industrial clusters.
industrial-power.tradeOff: Unlocks production and jobs, but the wrong energy mix can worsen emissions.

vocational.title: Vocational Skills Push
vocational.description: Expand technical training in construction, fabrication, logistics, and digital operations.
vocational.tradeOff: Builds long-term earning power, but needs follow-through from employers to stick.

water.title: Water Security Upgrade
water.description: Expand borehole networks, treatment systems, and distribution upgrades in underserved areas.
water.tradeOff: Essential for public health and resilience, though it competes with more visible spending.

roads.title: Inner-City Road Rehabilitation
roads.description: Repair critical roads and junctions connecting markets, schools, and residential zones.
roads.tradeOff: Popular and practical, but road-first strategy can become an expensive trap.

health.title: Primary Health Access
health.description: Upgrade local clinics, recruit staff, and improve medicine availability in dense communities.
health.tradeOff: Citizens feel the benefit fast, but financial return is indirect and slower.

cleanup.title: Pollution Cleanup and Monitoring
cleanup.description: Fund cleanup teams, water testing, and environmental enforcement in heavily impacted areas.
cleanup.tradeOff: Repairs damage and builds legitimacy, but may constrain extractive activity in the short term.

skills.title: Youth Employment Compact
skills.description: Blend apprenticeships, SME support, and placement incentives for unemployed young adults.
skills.tradeOff: Raises optimism quickly, but weak business conditions can limit the payoff.
